identity.name: Unit Name
identity.descriptionPlaceholder: Add a description for this unit...
identity.aiGenerateTooltip: Generate a description based on all unit data

areas.balconyTooltip: A projecting (cantilever) open-air space extending from the building façade on an upper floor, without supports below. Enclosed by a parapet or railing. Per the Greek Building Code (Law 4067/2012) it counts toward coverage and buildable area under specific conditions.
areas.terraceTooltip: An open-air space resting on a slab, the ground, or a rooftop, which may be supported by walls or columns. Typically covered by a pergola or canopy and larger than a balcony. Acts as an extension of the interior living space.
areas.netExceedsGross: Net area cannot exceed gross area

fieldLocking.soldBanner: This unit has been sold/rented — critical fields are locked (contracts, cadastre)
fieldLocking.reservedBanner: This unit is reserved — basic identity fields are locked

entityCode.formatWarning: Code does not follow the standard format

meta.enterNewName: Enter new name for the property:

versionHistory.title: Version History
versionHistory.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore this version? The current state will be saved as a new version.
versionHistory.selectVersion: Select a version to view details.

multiLevel.title: Property Levels
multiLevel.selectHierarchyFirst: Select unit type, building and floor first to unlock the fields.
multiLevel.autoCreated: {count} levels created automatically. You can add or remove levels.

noNextFloor.title: No next floor available
noNextFloor.description: This unit type requires at least 2 levels, but there is no next floor in the building. Add an additional floor to the building or select a lower floor.

optionalConfirm.title: Multiple levels?
optionalConfirm.description: Does this unit span more than one floor?

multiLevel.noBuildingOrFloor: Link a building and floor first to enable automatic level creation.

share.defaultMessage: Check out these interesting properties from Nestor Construct!
share.title: Nestor Construct - Properties

showcase.title: Property Showcase
showcase.subtitle: Generate a shareable showcase link
showcase.introText: Generates a unique link and branded PDF you can share with interested parties. The link remains valid for 30 days.

save.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to update this property.
save.askingPriceRequired: An asking price is required before reserving or selling this property.
save.buyerRequired: A buyer contact is required before reserving or selling this property.
save.buildingRequired: This property must be linked to a building before it can be reserved or sold.
save.areaRequired: This property must have an area defined before it can be reserved or sold.
save.unsavedProperty: Property has not been saved yet.

fieldLocking.serverReject: This property contains locked fields that cannot be changed in its current commercial state.

aiDescriptionDialog.title: AI Description
aiDescriptionDialog.subtitle: The AI analyzed the unit data and suggests the description below. You can edit it before accepting.
aiDescriptionDialog.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
aiDescriptionDialog.errorUnauthorized: You do not have permission for this action.
